items.title: [正面] Gacha yes, Good game yes

[负面] This is not very good. moblie port of a bad game.
...
items.summary:
This is not very good. moblie port of a bad game.

Its like Slay the Spire if it were $hite and made for weird anime paedo incels.
The graphics are bad, all the cards look the same with basic info superimposed on the front, somewhat illegible if you get the white text over a white section of the card image.

Load of long exposition thats really dull "blah blah blah classmates.... blah blah keys...blah blah chosen one ...nnngghhh"

I didnt care about the characters, story or gameplay and thankfully uninstalled it in under 20 minutes.
Conversely Slay the Spire 2 and the demo for vampire survivor crawlers had me hooked for hours.

This could appeal to that creepy adult demographic that likes anime schoolkids etc. but anyone else is better off just buying a proper deckbuilder and having fun

items.title: [正面] Ich kann Morimens nur empfehlen, wer Englisch kann...
items.summary: Ich kann Morimens nur empfehlen, wer Englisch kann oder die Story nicht braucht. Ich finde sie so lala. Hier und da bekommt man mal Charaktersorys erzählt, aber man kann das Game auch so genießen. Da es f2p ist kann man das einfach selber testen und um es einzuordnen;: Es ist wie Slay the Spire nur in schönerer Optik und besserer Atmospähre.
